title: ISO 14971 updated — 2026
body: A newer version of ISO 14971 may be available (2026). Verify at the official source and assess impact on your QMS.

title: Strontium Chromate From France: Preliminary Results of Antidumping Duty Administrative Review; 2023-2024
body: Published 2026-05-08. The U.S. Department of Commerce (Commerce) preliminarily determines that Soci[eacute]t[eacute] Nouvelle des Couleurs Zinciques (SNCZ) did not make sales of strontium chromate from France in the United States at less than normal value (NV) during the period of review (POR), November 1, 2023, through
